name: Small Cushion Bath Mat White - Room Essentials™: PVC Non-Slip, Molded Texture, Easy to Clean
description:
Enjoy your shower without worrying about accidental slips and falls with this Small Cushion Bath Mat from Room Essentials™. Designed with suction cups at the back, this rectangular white bath mat clings to your shower stall or bathtub floor to prevent slipping while taking a bath or shower, making it a functional piece for your bathroom. Featuring an embossed pattern and cushioned design, this bath mat provides comfortable footing and easy stability.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
